page_title: Get Accessibility Audit Services in USA

sections.title: Get Accessibility Audit Services in USA
sections.description:
Achieving digital and physical accessibility begins with a comprehensive audit. At Accessibility Innovations, we specialize in detailed assessments to evaluate your organization's current accessibility status. Our audits pinpoint strengths and uncover opportunities for improvement, providing a clear path to inclusivity.

Our method combines hands-on testing with a thorough review to ensure every aspect of accessibility is addressed. With precise, actionable insights, we guide you toward compliance with international standards, including WCAG and ADA.

Recognized Nationwide, our team works with clients ranging from government agencies to small businesses, helping them achieve and maintain exceptional accessibility standards across both physical and digital platforms.

image.alt: AI WCAG 2.2 Level A+AA Conformance Test Report. Left: Client info, test scope, content items breakdown, and major accessibility issues. Right: Side Drawer Inc., pie chart of test results (Pass/Fail/N/A), and detailed results table.

sections.title: Our Accessibility Audit Services
sections.description: Our accessibility audit services deliver an in-depth evaluation of your digital and physical spaces to ensure compliance with essential accessibility standards:

items.item: Digital Accessibility: We assess websites, web applications, and digital products for alignment with WCAG guidelines to eliminate barriers for users with disabilities.
Physical Accessibility: We evaluate workplaces, retail spaces, and customer-facing environments to identify and address barriers that hinder access for all individuals.

sections.title: Key Features of Our Accessibility Audits
sections.description: Accessibility audits involve conducting a thorough assessment of your website or web application to determine its compliance with accessibility standards, particularly the Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG)

items.title: Manual Audit
items.description:
A core component of our process is a detailed manual review of your digital and physical spaces. Our experts thoroughly evaluate:

Design: Ensuring intuitive layouts that accommodate users with varying abilities.

Navigation: Verifying ease of movement within physical spaces and smooth interaction with digital interfaces.

Functionality: Testing features to ensure they are accessible to assistive technologies and usable by all audiences.

By combining manual inspection with automated tools, we deliver a comprehensive and reliable analysis of your accessibility status.

items.title: VPAT Reports
items.description:
We provide Voluntary Product Accessibility Template (VPAT) reports as part of our audit services. A VPAT highlights:

Your product's level of compliance with accessibility standards.

Identified limitations and barriers.

Steps to address gaps, demonstrating your commitment to inclusive design.

A VPAT not only supports regulatory compliance but also reinforces your brand's dedication to accessibility.

sections.title: Our Accessibility Audit Services Includes
sections.description: Our audit reports provide a clear and actionable roadmap for enhancing accessibility in both digital and physical spaces. Each report includes:

items.title: Design Analysis
items.description: Reviews of digital layouts and physical blueprints to identify potential obstacles.

items.title: Navigation Assessment
items.description: Evaluation of ease of movement and interaction for all users.

items.title: Compliance Testing
items.description: Insights into how your spaces align with WCAG, ADA, and other standards.

items.title: Actionable Recommendations
items.description: Step-by-step solutions to resolve barriers and achieve compliance.

sections.footer_description: With Accessibility Innovations, you'll receive a report that is both comprehensive and practical, ensuring you can take confident steps toward inclusivity.

sections.footer_description: Contact Accessibility Innovations today to schedule an accessibility audit. Let us help you identify barriers, achieve compliance, and create a more inclusive environment for all!

sections.title: ADA/WCAG Compliance Help?
sections.description: Whether you're undergoing an accessibility audit or need help with compliance reports, we're here to support you. Contact us today to ensure your product is inclusive, accessible, and compliant!

items.question: What is the purpose of an accessibility audit?
items.answer: An accessibility audit evaluates a website's compliance with accessibility standards, identifies barriers preventing people with disabilities from using the site, and provides actionable recommendations to improve inclusivity and compliance.

items.question: How long does an accessibility audit take?
items.answer: The timeline depends on the size and complexity of the website. Small sites may take a few days, while larger or more complex platforms may require several weeks.

items.question: How do I get started with an accessibility audit?
items.answer: Contact us to schedule a consultation. We'll assess your needs and provide a customized plan for your accessibility audit.

items.question: How often should I conduct accessibility audits?
items.answer: Conduct audits annually or whenever significant changes are made to your website. Regular audits help maintain compliance and ensure ongoing accessibility.

items.question: What is included in an accessibility audit report?
items.answer: The report includes a detailed analysis of accessibility barriers, prioritized recommendations for remediation, an overview of compliance with relevant standards, and resources or guidelines for maintaining accessibility.

items.question: Do you provide both automated and manual testing during an audit?
items.answer: Yes, we use a combination of automated tools to quickly identify common issues and manual testing to catch more nuanced accessibility barriers that tools may miss.

items.question: Can the audit identify issues for users of assistive technologies?
items.answer: Absolutely! Our audit includes testing with assistive technologies like screen readers, keyboard navigation, and voice recognition software to ensure compatibility.

items.question: How much does an accessibility audit cost?
items.answer: The cost depends on the size and complexity of your website. We provide customized pricing based on your specific requirements.
